host.title: Host
host.description: TCP server hostname or IP address.

output.title: Output format
output.description: Serialisation format used to write audit events to the TCP stream.

connectTimeout.title: Connect timeout (ms)
connectTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for the TCP connection to be established.

reconnectAttempts.title: Reconnect attempts
reconnectAttempts.description: Number of reconnection attempts before giving up. Use -1 for infinite.

reconnectInterval.title: Reconnect interval (ms)
reconnectInterval.description: Time to wait between reconnection attempts.

retryTimeout.title: Retry timeout (ms)
retryTimeout.description: Time to wait before starting a new reconnection cycle.

trustAll.title: Trust all certificates
trustAll.description: Accept any server certificate without validation. Not recommended for production.

verifyHost.title: Verify hostname
verifyHost.description: Verify that the server hostname matches the TLS certificate CN / SAN.

keystore.title: Keystore (mutual TLS)
keystore.description: Client certificate for mutual TLS authentication. Leave empty if mutual TLS is not required.

value.title: Content
value.description: Base64-encoded keystore content (JKS or PKCS12 only).

keyValue.title: Private key
keyValue.description: PEM private key content (PEM type only).

truststore.title: Truststore
truststore.description: CA certificates used to verify the server certificate. Leave empty to use the JVM default truststore.

value.title: Content
value.description: Base64-encoded truststore content (JKS or PKCS12 only).

certValue.title: CA certificate
certValue.description: PEM CA certificate content (PEM type only).
